refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imguidedfilter(inputImage) out = imguidedfilter(inputImage, guide, radius, epsilon)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses a local linear model between the guide and input images. RGB inputs are converted to grayscale for the current macro implementation. The result is double precision.

refsection.title: Examples
